description: Detailed information about a Bulk API 2.0 query job, including its current state and processing statistics.
name: QueryJobInfo

id.description: The unique identifier of the query job.

object.description: The primary SObject type in the SOQL query. Derived automatically from the query.

state.description: The current state of a Bulk API 2.0 job, indicating where it is in its lifecycle.

createdDate.description: The date and time the job was created, in ISO 8601 format.

systemModstamp.description: The date and time the job was last modified, in ISO 8601 format.

numberRecordsProcessed.description: The number of records returned by the query.

errorMessage.description: Error message if the job reached the Failed state. Describes the reason for failure.

contentType.description: The content type of the query results.

columnDelimiter.description: The column delimiter used in the results CSV.

lineEnding.description: The line ending used in the results CSV.

jobType.description: The job type (V2Query for Bulk API 2.0 query jobs).

createdById.description: The Salesforce user ID of the user who created the job.

apiVersion.description: The API version used to create the job.
